infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CropSetu needs camera access to photograph your crops for AI disease analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CropSetu needs photo library access to upload crop images for analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CropSetu uses your location to show local weather conditions for your farm.
